modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot print to PDF in Windows 10.

full_description_text: User want to print to PDF but it not work. They say they don’t know how to do it in Windows 10. It is confusing for them and they need help.
short_description: Cannot print to PDF in Windows 10.
description: User want to print to PDF but it not work. They say they don’t know how to do it in Windows 10. It is confusing for them and they need help.
